raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/2023, {$2600.00} was charged to my Citi card account without my consent. Despite my repeated attempts to dispute this charge through the customer service department, I have not received a satisfactory resolution. Similarly, despite numerous attempts to resolve this issue by contacting the Department of Credit Card Dispute, I have not received any response or assistance.

Every time I called, they put me on hold for several hours and transferred the call to different departments. In my last attempt, they said that my case was closed and that I had to contact the retail store, which was outside the country. I sent two letters, but they have not responded to me.

The Transaction was made in another country, the XXXX XXXX, during a five-day Family vacation. I stayed in an all-inclusive resort and did not leave the resort. When I called to start the dispute, the customer service representative claimed that my husband 's card was the card used for the transaction. I told them that my husband hadn't used this card since we opened the account. His card during the trip to XXXX was stored in our home in the safe box. I requested the invoice or signatures for the purchase, which they have not provided. I learned that the store where the transaction was made is a hardware store. I don't own property in XXXX and we don't have family or friends that live in XXXX , there is not reason for me to have made such a large transaction.
